mapper.select: select order_id,order_no,user_id,pay_amount,status,receiver_name,receiver_phone,receiver_address,create_time,ship_time,finish_time from t_order where status = 20 order by create_time desc limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update t_order set status = 30, ship_time = now(), update_time = now() where order_id = #{orderId} and status = 20
update t_order set status = 40, finish_time = now(), update_time = now() where order_id = #{orderId} and status = 30
